## Methodology

- **Tool:** k6 + custom Go benchmark harness
- **Environment:** 21-core, 192 GB RAM
- **Dataset:** 57M entities
- **Warmup:** 60 s
- **Duration:** 10 min per profile

## Results

| Endpoint | p50 (ms) | p90 (ms) | p99 (ms) | RPS | Error Rate |
|----------|----------|----------|----------|-----|-----------|
| /api/v1/endpoint-893 | 13 | 88 | 496 | 34863 | 1.75% |
| /api/v1/endpoint-956 | 46 | 47 | 410 | 14080 | 0.68% |
| /api/v1/endpoint-763 | 26 | 111 | 59 | 37610 | 0.85% |
| /api/v1/endpoint-452 | 31 | 26 | 167 | 2589 | 1.62% |
| /api/v1/endpoint-575 | 20 | 64 | 326 | 2673 | 1.28% |

### Flame Graph Interpretation

```
  total: 1420 ms
    handler.Execute: 1400 ms
      sql.Prepare:    45 ms
      sql.Query:      980 ms  ← dominant
        parseRow:     120 ms
        marshalJSON:  180 ms
      validateResp:   85 ms
```

## Recommendations

1. Add composite index on (status, created_at) — estimated 60% improvement
2. Batch JSON marshaling with pooled buffers
3. Introduce read-through cache for hot entities (TTL 30 s)
4. Evaluate protobuf encoding for internal calls
